lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਤੜੀਏ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: anadin ratarree sehaj mileejai |
lines.english: Night and day, imbued with His Love, you shall meet with Him with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲੀਜੈ ਰੋਸੁ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ਗਰਬੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sukh sehaj mileejai ros na keejai garab nivaar samaanee |
lines.english: In celestial peace and poise, you shall meet Him; do not harbor anger - subdue your proud self!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਨਾਚੀ ਤਬ ਘੂਘਟੁ ਕੈਸਾ ਮਟੁਕੀ ਫੋੜਿ ਨਿਰਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jab naachee tab ghooghatt kaisaa mattukee forr niraaree |
lines.english: When you dance, what veil covers you? Break the water pot, and be unattached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਈ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: saachai raatee milai milaaee manamukh aavan jaanee |
lines.english: Imbued with Truth, I am united in His Union, while the self-willed manmukhs continue coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak aapai aap pachhaanai guramukh tat beechaaree |4|4|
lines.english: O Nanak, realize your own self; as Gurmukh, contemplate the essence of reality. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਖਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: tukhaaree mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Tukhaari, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਲਾਲ ਰੰਗੀਲੇ ਹਮ ਲਾਲਨ ਕੇ ਲਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: mere laal rangeele ham laalan ke laale |
lines.english: O my Dear Beloved, I am the slave of Your slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ ਜਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਇਆ ਜਾ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur alakh lakhaaeaa jaa tis bhaaeaa jaa prabh kirapaa dhaaree |
lines.english: The Guru showed me the Invisible Lord, when it pleased Him, and when God showered His Blessings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਇਆ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur alakh lakhaaeaa avar na doojaa bhaale |
lines.english: The Guru has shown me the Invisible Lord, and now, I do not seek any other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਬਨਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jagajeevan daataa purakh bidhaataa sehaj mile banavaaree |
lines.english: The Life of the World, the Great Giver, the Primal Lord, the Architect of Destiny, the Lord of the woods - I have met Him with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੂ ਤਾਰਹਿ ਤਰੀਐ ਸਚੁ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kareh too taareh tareeai sach devahu deen deaalaa |
lines.english: Bestow Your Glance of Grace and carry me across, to save me. Please bless me with the Truth, O Lord, Merciful to the meek.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਣਵਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸਾ ਤੂ ਸਰਬ ਜੀਆ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pranavat naanak daasan daasaa too sarab jeea pratipaalaa |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I am the slave of Your slaves. You are the Cherisher of all souls. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਿਪੁਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਰਹੇ ਅਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: bharipur dhaar rahe at piaare |
lines.english: My Dear Beloved is enshrined throughout the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਰੂਪਿ ਮੁਰਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sabade rav rahiaa gur roop muraare |
lines.english: The Shabad is pervading, through the Guru, the Embodiment of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗੀ ਜਿਨਸੀ ਜੰਤ ਉਪਾਏ ਨਿਤ ਦੇਵੈ ਚੜੈ ਸਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: rangee jinasee jant upaae nit devai charrai savaaeaa |
lines.english: He created the beings of various colors and kinds; His Blessings increase day by day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਰੂਪ ਮੁਰਾਰੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਧਾਰੇ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur roop muraare tribhavan dhaare taa kaa ant na paaeaa |
lines.english: The Guru, the Embodiment of the Lord, is enshrined throughout the three worlds; His limits cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੀਰਾ ਹੀਰੈ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਗੁਣ ਕੈ ਹਾਰਿ ਪਰੋਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak heeraa heerai bedhiaa gun kai haar parovai |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the diamond of the mind is pierced through by the diamond of spiritual wisdom. The garland of virtue is strung. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਆਪੇ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aparanpar aape thaap uthaape tis bhaavai so hovai |
lines.english: The Infinite Lord Himself establishes and disestablishes; whatever pleases Him, happens.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗੁਣਹਿ ਸਮਾਣੇ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਨਾਮ ਨੀਸਾਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: gun guneh samaane masatak naam neesaano |
lines.english: The virtuous person merges in the Virtuous Lord; his forehead bears the insignia of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ਚੂਕਾ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: sach saach samaaeaa chookaa aavan jaano |
lines.english: The true person merges in the True Lord; his comings and goings are over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਾਚਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਸਾਚੈ ਰਾਤਾ ਸਾਚੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sach saach pachhaataa saachai raataa saach milai man bhaavai |
lines.english: The true person realizes the True Lord, and is imbued with Truth. He meets the True Lord, and is pleasing to the Lord's Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਊਪਰਿ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੀਸੈ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saache aoopar avar na deesai saache saach samaavai |
lines.english: No one else is seen to be above the True Lord; the true person merges in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਜਾ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਅਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak jotee jot samaanee jaa miliaa at piaare |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, my light merged into the Light, when I met my most Darling Beloved. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਨਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਲੀਆ ਮਨੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਬੰਧਨ ਖੋਲਿ ਨਿਰਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mohan mohi leea man meraa bandhan khol niraare |
lines.english: The Fascinating Lord has fascinated my mind; releasing me from bondage, He has set me free.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵੈ ਸਚੁ ਦਾਨੋ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਨੋ ਸਦ ਦਾਤਾ ਵਡ ਦਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: devai sach daano so paravaano sad daataa vadd daanaa |
lines.english: Whoever the Lord has blessed with the gift of Truth is accepted; the Supremely Wise Lord is forever the Great Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਨਹ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh neh paaeeai guramukh giaano |
lines.english: The Gurmukh obtains spiritual wisdom, while the self-willed manmukh does not.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚ ਘਰੁ ਖੋਜਿ ਲਹੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਗੁਰ ਥਾਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: sach ghar khoj lahe saachaa gur thaano |
lines.english: By searching, the true home, the place of the True Guru is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਰੁ ਅਜੋਨੀ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਜਾਪੈ ਸਾਚਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਚਿਰਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: amar ajonee asathir jaapai saachaa mehal chiraanaa |
lines.english: He is known to be Immortal, Unborn and Permanent; the True Mansion of His Presence is everlasting.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਤਿ ਉਚਾਪਤਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਨ ਲਿਖੀਐ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮੁਰਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: dot uchaapat lekh na likheeai pragattee jot muraaree |
lines.english: The day-to-day account of deeds is not recorded for that person, who manifests the radiance of the Divine Light of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਚੈ ਰਾਚਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਤਰੀਐ ਤਾਰੀ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak saachaa saachai raachaa guramukh tareeai taaree |4|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, the true person is absorbed in the True Lord; the Gurmukh crosses over to the other side. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਖਾਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: tukhaaree mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Tukhaari, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਮੇਰਿਆ ਤੂ ਸਮਝੁ ਅਚੇਤ ਇਆਣਿਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: e man meriaa too samajh achet eaaniaa raam |
lines.english: O my ignorant, unconscious mind, reform yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਮੇਰਿਆ ਛਡਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਗੁਣੀ ਸਮਾਣਿਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: e man meriaa chhadd avagan gunee samaaniaa raam |
lines.english: O my mind, leave behind your faults and demerits, and be absorbed in virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਸਾਦ ਲੁਭਾਣੇ ਕਿਰਤ ਕਮਾਣੇ ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਨਹੀ ਮੇਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: bahu saad lubhaane kirat kamaane vichhurriaa nahee melaa |
lines.english: You are deluded by so many flavors and pleasures, and you act in such confusion. You are separated, and you will not meet your Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਤਰੀਐ ਜਮ ਡਰਿ ਮਰੀਐ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਪੰਥੁ ਦੁਹੇਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: kiau dutar tareeai jam ddar mareeai jam kaa panth duhelaa |
lines.english: How can the impassible world-ocean be crossed? The fear of the Messenger of Death is deadly. The path of Death is agonizingly painful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਤਾ ਸਾਝ ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤਾ ਅਵਘਟਿ ਰੁਧਾ ਕਿਆ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: man raam nahee jaataa saajh prabhaataa avaghatt rudhaa kiaa kare |
lines.english: The mortal does not know the Lord in the evening, or in the morning; trapped on the treacherous path, what will he do then?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੰਧਨਿ ਬਾਧਿਆ ਇਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਛੂਟੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵੈ ਨਰਹਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bandhan baadhiaa in bidh chhoottai guramukh sevai narahare |1|
lines.english: Bound in bondage, he is released only by this method: as Gurmukh, serve the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਮੇਰਿਆ ਤੂ ਛੋਡਿ ਆਲ ਜੰਜਾਲਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: e man meriaa too chhodd aal janjaalaa raam |
lines.english: O my mind, abandon your household entanglements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਮੇਰਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਹੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਾਲਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: e man meriaa har sevahu purakh niraalaa raam |
lines.english: O my mind, serve the Lord, the Primal, Detached Lord.
